DISTORTNOISE
Est. 2019 · Tokyo
THE
BANDS
Four bands. One scene.
01 — Raw Punk / Hardcore
BLISTERING NOISE
Tokyo · Est. 2020
Political raw punk from Tokyo. Members of Zodiak, Unarm, Dropend, Kafka, Kriegshög. Confrontational, fast, and uncompromising. Japanese-language lyrics confronting war, state violence, and complicity.
Raw PunkHardcorePoliticalJapanese Lyrics
02 — D-Beat / Crust Punk
DETHCAT
Tokyo · Est. 2018
D-beat and crust punk in the tradition of Discharge and Doom. Heavy, repetitive, relentless. Wall-of-noise guitar tone and barked vocals that cut through the mix.
D-BeatCrust PunkDischarge-style
03 — Street Punk / Oi!
PAYBACK BOYS
Tokyo · Est. 2015
Working-class street punk and Oi! with roots in the Tokyo skinhead scene. Anthemic, direct, built for live shows. A fixture of the Tokyo underground for over a decade.
Street PunkOi!Skinhead
04 — Noise / Experimental
AKIHIRO SUZUKI
Tokyo · Solo
Solo noise and experimental sound artist. Improvisation, found sound, and pure signal. Performances exist in the space between music and anti-music. No setlist. No repetition.
NoiseExperimentalImprovisation
DISTORTNOISE

DISTORTNOISE
Est. 2019 · Tokyo
NOISE IS
THE MESSAGE.

Distort Noise is a Tokyo-based underground label and collective founded in 2019. No managers, no PR, no compromise. Every release is self-produced, self-distributed, and fully independent.

We platform bands that have something to say. Raw punk, noise, crust, street punk — genres rooted in resistance and community. Our shows are DIY. Our releases are physical-first.

4
Active Bands
7
Years Active
40+
Shows Played
12
Releases
What we believe
  • DIY or die — no labels, no management, no compromise
  • Music is political — silence is complicity
  • All ages, all bodies, all welcome at shows
  • Physical media over streaming — tapes, vinyl, zines
  • Anti-fascist, anti-war, pro-community
The collective
  • Blistering Noise — Raw punk / political hardcore
  • Dethcat — D-beat crust punk
  • Payback Boys — Street punk and Oi!
  • Akihiro Suzuki — Noise and experimental
